nodes.label: Biometric Unlock as UX Theater — Vault Key Recoverable from IndexedDB Alone
nodes.norm_label: biometric unlock as ux theater — vault key recoverable from indexeddb alone

nodes.label: Zero-Knowledge Architecture
nodes.rationale: Vault keys and decrypted payloads must never be persisted; state management uses Zustand stores with auto-lock and biometric layers via hooks; IndexedDB stores only encrypted data.

nodes.label: WebAuthn PRF Vault Unlock (S1)
nodes.rationale: Replaces insecure device-key scheme (recomputable from stored values) with PRF extension. The vault key wrap key is derived via HKDF-SHA256 from an authenticator secret never stored; biometric unlock is demonstrably zero-knowledge. Legacy credentials stripped by DB v6 migration; non-PRF devices fall back to master password.

nodes.label: Module Loading Pattern (Lazy Import for WASM/UMD)
nodes.rationale: argon2-browser is a UMD module that breaks Vite ESM when top-level imported. Must use dynamic import pattern and exclude from optimizeDeps.
nodes.norm_label: module loading pattern (lazy import for wasm/umd)

nodes.label: React 19 StrictMode Safe useEffect Pattern
nodes.rationale: React 19 StrictMode runs effects twice in dev; always use mounted flag + timeout fallback to prevent stale updates and ensure offline-first resilience.

nodes.label: Security Headers via HTTP (not meta tags)
nodes.rationale: X-Frame-Options via meta tag is invalid; security headers must only be set via server config (vite.config.ts middleware + vercel.json headers).
nodes.norm_label: security headers via http (not meta tags)

nodes.label: Scrypt Master Password Hashing
nodes.rationale: Migrated from Argon2id (argon2-browser) to Scrypt (@noble/hashes/scrypt) to resolve CSP/WASM loading issues. Parameters: N=32768 (2^15), r=8, p=1, dkLen=32, 128-bit salt.

nodes.label: WebAuthn PRF Zero-Knowledge Biometric Unlock (S1)
nodes.rationale: PRF output from authenticator hardware fed through HKDF-SHA256 (info: TrustVault Vault Key Wrapping v1) to derive non-extractable AES-256-GCM wrap key. Storage holds only {wrappedVaultKey, prfSalt, vaultKeyScheme}. PRF output and wrap key are never persisted. Replaces device-key scheme where inputs were all stored and recomputable offline.

nodes.label: PRF Support Tri-State Detection
nodes.rationale: Three states: Known unsupported (no WebAuthn/PRF → biometric not offered), Unknown (capabilities API unavailable → attempt with hard-verify), never insecure recomputable scheme.

nodes.label: OCR Credential Capture (Local-Only Tesseract.js)
nodes.rationale: 100% client-side OCR via Tesseract.js in Web Workers + WASM; captured image buffer zeroed and released immediately after OCR; images never written to IndexedDB/localStorage/disk.

nodes.label: Exponential Backoff Lockout Thresholds
nodes.rationale: OWASP-aligned exponential backoff: 5 failures→30s, 10→5min, 15→30min, 20+→1hr. Error message never leaks whether email exists. Survives page refresh (IndexedDB vs in-memory). Called before expensive Scrypt hash to fail fast.

hyperedges.label: Biometric Vault Key Encryption Chain (PBKDF2 + WebAuthn + UserRepo)
WebAuthn Dead Code Fix — Cross-Document Security Event
Vault Key Security Chain: Scrypt + PBKDF2 + AES-GCM + WebAuthn PRF
Audit vs Reality Gap: Biometric Theater + Plaintext Metadata + Unsafe CSP
Rate Limiting Auth Flow (checkRateLimit → Scrypt → clearAttempts/recordFailed)
